title_en: For Every Little Light That Dreams
dedication_tr: Büyük hayaller kuran tüm küçük ışıklara ithaf edilmiştir.
dedication_en: Dedicated to every little light that dares to dream.
audience_setting_note: If the final video is primarily directed to young audiences, set the upload audience correctly in YouTube Studio before public release.
lyrics_tr: Küçük ışık uyanır / Mor bulutta parıldar / Bir ay çizer kağıttan / Hayal göğe fısıldar
lyrics_en: Little light wakes up / In a purple cloud it glows / Draws a moon from paper / And lets a dream float home
visual_plan: 8-16s tiny friendly robot places soft stars
next_step: Generate vertical MP4, upload private after OAuth, review audience setting, then decide public release.
